subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! Days have passed, and We have not heard from the bird of thy heart the melodies of love, nor have We perceived from thee any fragrances [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا محمد قد مضی ایام و ما سمعنا عن طیر قلبک نغمات الحب و ما وجدنا منک روایح
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @spiritual transformation, @presence of; reunion with God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
